title: Editor as standalone product — split docs viewer from editor (Tauri + Rust core)
description: Extract the live editor out of the Astro docs framework into its own product: Rust core (yrs CRDT, file ops), thin headless server binary, Tauri desktop app, and shared web frontend. The docs viewer (Astro) stays focused on rendering; the editor stops being a dev-tool dependency.
author: sidhantha
